PrimaryPurpose: One-click walk-up triage and fast target checks.
TypicalTools: Quick Diagnosis; Latest Report; Ping; TCPing; Tracert; NSLookup; DNS lookup; WHOIS; DISM/SFC after review; hardware shortcuts
PlacementNotes: Keep focused. Do not use as a dumping ground.

PrimaryPurpose: Saved computer profiles and profile reports.
TypicalTools: View; Take Profile; Delete; Refresh
PlacementNotes: Replaces old fingerprint wording.

PrimaryPurpose: Evidence collection and Windows health analysis.
TypicalTools: Event Log Triage; Service Health; Startup Impact; Windows Update Health; GPResult HTML; Hardware Health; Disk Health; Driver Review; Remote Management Readiness
PlacementNotes: Use after Quick Diagnosis identifies an area to investigate.

PrimaryPurpose: Update scan, history, download, install, uninstall, and repair.
TypicalTools: Refresh Updates; Download Selected; Install Selected; Uninstall Selected; Repair Windows Update
PlacementNotes: Separate because update work is slow and stateful.

PrimaryPurpose: Hardware identity, device, driver, storage, and sensor utilities.
TypicalTools: CPU-Z; GPU-Z; HWiNFO; HWMonitor; CrystalDiskInfo; PCI-Z; SSD-Z; Speccy; QuickMemoryTestOK
PlacementNotes: VMs may limit physical hardware visibility.

PrimaryPurpose: BSOD, dump, reliability, crash event, and unexpected reboot work.
TypicalTools: Minidump Collector; BlueScreenView; Reliability Monitor; Crash Event Summary
PlacementNotes: Collect dumps before opening dump viewers.

PrimaryPurpose: Process, handle, DLL, startup, and resource inspection.
TypicalTools: Process Explorer; Process Monitor; RAMMap; System Informer; TCPView; Autoruns
PlacementNotes: Process Monitor should be filtered before capture.

PrimaryPurpose: Endpoint connectivity, route, port, packet loss, and path testing.
TypicalTools: Connectivity Triage; Adapter Route Health; Packet Loss Monitor; Live Route Trace; Test-NetConnection; PsPing; WinMTR; TLS Certificate Check
PlacementNotes: DHCP tools do not belong here unless they are only target connectivity checks.

PrimaryPurpose: DHCP, DNS, time, and local exposure checks.
TypicalTools: DHCP Sleuth; DHCP Scope Inspector; DHCP Lease / Rogue Check; DNS Diagnostics; Time Sync Health; Reset to Domain Time; Local Exposure Inspector
PlacementNotes: Formerly Services. DHCP tools are grouped here.

PrimaryPurpose: Finding hosts, services, subnets, ARP neighbors, and wake targets.
TypicalTools: Network Discovery; Port and Service Test; Service Fingerprinter; ARP Inventory Exporter; Subnet Calculator; Wake-on-LAN
PlacementNotes: Discovery scans should prompt clearly and avoid freezing the GUI.

PrimaryPurpose: Remote access and file transfer.
TypicalTools: Launch RDP; WinSCP; PuTTY; KiTTY; mRemoteNG; RustDesk; TightVNC; Enable Remote Management
PlacementNotes: Readiness checks belong on Analyze; enabling/connecting belongs here.

PrimaryPurpose: Guided PsExec command building and execution.
TypicalTools: Target; credentials; elevation; interactive/system flags; captured output
PlacementNotes: Dedicated tab because argument prompts and output handling are required.

PrimaryPurpose: Domain, Active Directory, secure channel, and Group Policy checks.
TypicalTools: Domain Logon Health; GPO Health; GPResult; ADExplorer; ADInsight; ADRestore
PlacementNotes: Directory and policy work has distinct technician intent.

PrimaryPurpose: Malware, persistence, signatures, privacy, and hardening.
TypicalTools: Microsoft Safety Scanner; Malwarebytes AdwCleaner; ClamWin; Autoruns; Sigcheck; HijackThis; xpy; password tools
PlacementNotes: Security scanners and persistence tools live together.

PrimaryPurpose: Wireless-specific troubleshooting.
TypicalTools: Wi-Fi Issue Scan; Wi-Fi Status; Wi-Fi Profiles; Wi-Fi Networks; Wi-Fi Backup / Restore
PlacementNotes: Separate from Network because wireless failures have distinct causes. Profile backup/restore is a wireless migration and recovery workflow.

PrimaryPurpose: Printer, spooler, queue, and stale printer artifact work.
TypicalTools: Print Queue Maintenance; Print Spooler Triage; Stale Printer Cleanup
PlacementNotes: Custom print tools belong here.

PrimaryPurpose: File search, comparison, disk usage, and file-level utilities.
TypicalTools: Everything; WizTree; WinDirStat; WinMerge; Kudu; Handle
PlacementNotes: Cleanup/removal-first tools should move to Clean Up.

PrimaryPurpose: Plain-language robocopy builder.
TypicalTools: Build; Copy; Preview; Run
PlacementNotes: Dedicated tab because this is a full workflow.

PrimaryPurpose: General portable productivity/support apps.
TypicalTools: Firefox Portable; Notepad++; LibreOffice; Draw.io; KompoZer; safe download links
PlacementNotes: Do not mix Chocolatey management here.

PrimaryPurpose: Local product/license key discovery.
TypicalTools: Windows/software key discovery report
PlacementNotes: Treat outputs as confidential client data.

PrimaryPurpose: Cleanup, uninstallers, stale profiles, leftovers, and recovery.
TypicalTools: BleachBit; CCleaner; Bulk Uninstaller; Revo Uninstaller; Wise Registry Cleaner; Profile Cleanup; Recuva
PlacementNotes: Confirm scope before destructive cleanup.

PrimaryPurpose: Chocolatey package discovery and install/update/uninstall workflows.
TypicalTools: Install Chocolatey; Search; Install Selected; Scan Installed; Upgrade; Uninstall; Add to Toolbox
PlacementNotes: Separate computer-installed packages from toolkit-installed apps.

PrimaryPurpose: Fallback for Sysinternals tools with no better functional tab.
TypicalTools: ShellRunas; portmon; notmyfault; obscure utilities
PlacementNotes: Move clear fits to functional tabs.

PrimaryPurpose: Technician-facing outputs.
TypicalTools: Search; Refresh Reports; Open Selected; Delete Selected; AI bundle/import/final report flows
PlacementNotes: Do not list raw logs or JSON noise here.
